files.content: @@directive("'use client'") type icon = | IconFrame | IconLifeBuoy | IconMap | IconPieChart | IconSend let renderIcon = (~icon) => switch icon { | IconFrame => | IconLifeBuoy => | IconMap => | IconPieChart => | IconSend => } type project = { name: string, url: string, icon: icon, } let projects: array = [ {name: "Design Engineering", url: "#", icon: IconFrame}, {name: "Sales & Marketing", url: "#", icon: IconPieChart}, {name: "Travel", url: "#", icon: IconMap}, {name: "Support", url: "#", icon: IconLifeBuoy}, {name: "Feedback", url: "#", icon: IconSend}, ] @react.component let make = () => {"Projects"->React.string} {projects ->Array.map(project => } className="group-has-[[data-state=open]]/menu-item:bg-sidebar-accent" > {renderIcon(~icon=project.icon)} {project.name->React.string} }> {"More"->React.string} {"Edit Project"->React.string} {"Delete Project"->React.string} ) ->React.array}
